about: Passionate about Data Science and AI, I look forward to carry out my research and work as a Research Scientist.

Research Scientist with a strong data science and machine learning foundation driven to create impactful solutions. Skilled in programming, data analysis, and visualization with a proven leadership and event coordination track records.
_aboutNote: Contains banned buzzwords ('impactful solutions', 'proven track record') and inflated 'Research Scientist' title. Rewritten honestly in src/data/site.ts.
